Workset name (from Revit worksharing)
Phase created name (element birth phase)
Phase demolished name (element demolition phase)
Design option set and option name
Assembly/Uniformat classification code from family type
Assembly code description text
Element bounding box volume (m3)
Element elevation from project base point (m)
Host element type and ID (for hosted families)
Connected/joined element summary (count and types)
Analytical model status and type
Structural usage (beam, column, brace, other)
Structural material grade (C30/37, S355, etc.)
Connected MEP system name(s)
MEP system abbreviation code
Number of active connectors on element
Upstream connected element (supply source)
Downstream connected element (served element)
Embodied energy (MJ/unit) from material data
Material recyclability percentage
Expected service life in years (for lifecycle costing)
Replacement cost (UGX) for lifecycle analysis
Applicable building code clause reference
Accessibility compliance status (COMPLIANT/NON-COMPLIANT/N-A)
Environmental certification reference (EDGE/LEED/BREEAM)
Maintenance frequency (DAILY/WEEKLY/MONTHLY/QUARTERLY/ANNUAL)
Last service/inspection date
Warranty expiry date or period
Required spare parts for maintenance
Maintenance access requirements (height, clearance, tools)
Commissioning status (NOT_STARTED/IN_PROGRESS/PASSED/FAILED)
Test certificate reference number
Handover/practical completion status
Tie-in point reference code (e.g. TI-M-HWS-001). Assembled by STING from DISC+SYS+SEQ.
Tie-in point status: OPEN / CONNECTED / CAPPED / DEFERRED. OPEN = live unresolved termination.
Construction phase at which tie-in is made: PH1 / PH2 / PH3 / FUTURE.
Responsible party for making the tie-in connection: MAIN / SUB / SPECIALIST / FUTURE.
Size of pipe/duct/conduit at the tie-in point (e.g. DN50, 400x250, 32mm EMT). Auto-read from PLM_PPE_SZ_MM or HVC_DCT_SZ_TXT.
Invert or centreline elevation at tie-in point (e.g. 3450 AFFL). Populate from survey or design data.
Flow direction at tie-in end: SUP (supply), RET (return), BIDIR (bidirectional), UNKWN (unknown).
Interface Control Document reference linking to the Interface Register (IFC/ICD number). ISO 19650-2.
Tie-in resolved flag: No/0 = open live termination, Yes/1 = tie-in completed and connected.
Assembled tie-in display tag (e.g. TI-M-HWS-001). Auto-populated from DISC+SYS+SEQ by STING.
Display mode tag string (e.g. AHU-0042). Written by BuildDisplayTag() based on STING_DISPLAY_MODE setting.
Asset serial number. Maps from Revit ALL_MODEL_SERIAL_NUMBER. Used in COBie Component Section 7F.
Unified flow rate. Cross-written from PLM_PIPE_FLOW or HVC_AIRFLOW for legend generation.
Unified power rating. Cross-written from ELC_POWER for legend generation.
Room upper offset height in mm. Maps from ROOM_UPPER_OFFSET.
Stair actual headroom height in mm. Maps from STAIRS_ACTUAL_HEADROOM_HEIGHT.
Railing height in mm. Maps from RAILING_HEIGHT.
Parking bay width in mm. Maps from FAMILY_WIDTH_PARAM for parking elements.
HVAC equipment COP/efficiency ratio. Maps from RBS_MECH_COP_PARAM.
Wall acoustic STC rating. Derived from wall width or RBS_ACOUSTICS param.
Structural rebar cover in mm. Maps from COVER_TOP_PARAM.
Foundation depth in mm. Maps from INSTANCE_ELEVATION_PARAM.
Ceiling height offset in mm. Maps from dimensional params.
Installation date formatted as YYYY-MM-DD. Derived from Phase Created.
User notes field. Writable by BulkNoteCommand and general data entry.
Sleeve reference code
Sleeve size in millimetres
Sleeve material (steel/PVC/cast iron)
Sleeve fire rating (e.g. EI60, EI120)
Seal type (intumescent/mechanical/composite)
Service passing through sleeve
Host wall or floor type
Host element thickness in mm
Annular gap between service and sleeve in mm
Firestop system manufacturer
Firestop product reference
Fire test standard (BS EN 1366-3, ASTM E814)
Sleeve status (OPEN/SEALED/PENDING INSPECTION)
Last inspection date
Deterministic UUIDv5 keyed on (host, mep) — round-trip key for IFC Pset_ProvisionForVoid and BCF topic GUID.
Round sleeve bore in millimetres (element OD + 2× insulation + 2× clearance, clamped to rule minimum).
Rectangular sleeve clear-opening width in millimetres.
Rectangular sleeve clear-opening height in millimetres.
Sleeve depth in millimetres (host thickness + 2× protrusion).
Fire rating inherited from the host wall/floor TYPE (BS EN 13501-2 / EI rating).
Identifier of the sizing rule from STING_SLEEVE_RULES.json that produced this sleeve.
UL or BS EN 1366-3 firestop system reference for this sleeve.
ElementId.IntegerValue of the host wall/floor/roof.
ElementId.IntegerValue of the penetrating MEP element.
STING command that placed the sleeve (audit trail).

params.description: Multi-line top — DISC-LOC-ZONE-LVL (top line of a 2-line tag family layout: place TAG_5 above TAG_6)
Multi-line bottom — SYS-FUNC-PROD-SEQ (bottom line of a 2-line tag family layout: place below TAG_5)
Comprehensive descriptive narrative — AI-assembled asset profile with embedded markup tokens for rich rendering
TAG7 Section A: Identity Header — asset name, product, manufacturer, model (styled as BOLD in tag families)
TAG7 Section B: System & Function Context — full system/function descriptions (styled as ITALIC in tag families)
TAG7 Section C: Spatial Context — room, department, grid reference
TAG7 Section D: Lifecycle & Status — status, revision, origin, maintenance
TAG7 Section E: Technical Specifications — discipline-specific MEP/BLE performance data
TAG7 Section F: Classification & Reference — Uniformat, OmniClass, keynote, cost, ISO tag

Single-parameter multi-line tag (DISC
LOC
ZONE
…
SEQ) for tag families that bind ONE Label to ONE parameter and want auto line-breaking. Separator is the literal two-char string "
"; AssembleContainer.ResolveSeparator turns it into an actual LF at write time so Revit Label engines render it as a line break.
Air terminal / finial full tag (BS EN 62305-3)
Surge protective device full tag (BS EN 62305-4)
Test clamp / inspection point full tag (BS EN 62305-3)

identity.description: Asset item code / stock reference for procurement and spares
Pipe/duct/circuit system memberships (pipe system names, semicolon-separated)
Termination capped/blanked flag (connectivity validator — open end with intentional cap)
Reason an open termination is intentional (e.g. future-connection, cap, valve)
Routing trace sequence index within a network path (AutoDrop engine output)

extended_tokens.description: Revision code (display label, GROUP 1). See also ASS_REV_COD_TXT (GROUP 17) for the ISO 19650 tag container token.

iso19650_naming.description: ISO 19650 suitability/status code for CDE delivery (S0 WIP / S1 Suitable for coordination / S2 Suitable for info / S3 Shared / S4 Published / S5 Archive). Canonical GUID matches MR_PARAMETERS.txt; supersedes the orphan a57dfe0c-6db9-4fb6-80e0-d2c453fe653b entry that previously sat under the ASS_STATUS_TXT name in this registry.
ISO 19650 revision code token in the tag container system (GROUP 17). Written by the tag pipeline. See also ASS_REV_TXT (GROUP 1) for the display revision label.

Curtain wall panel height in mm
Curtain wall panel width in mm
Cable tray internal width in mm [ISO 19650-1:2018]
Cable tray internal depth / height in mm [ISO 19650-1:2018]

Standard LPD limit for the room type (W/m²) [STING Phase 178]

Busbar trunking duct fill % [STING Phase 179]

Electrical system code (LV/MV/HV/ELV/EES/UPS)

Cable segment classification (fire-rated: PH30/PH60/PH120) [BS EN 50200]

Duct insulation thickness in mm (CIBSE Guide B3 / BS EN 13180)

system_params.description: Drawing Type profile ID stamped on views and sheets by DrawingTypePresentation.Apply [Phase 113]
Lock flag preventing DrawingSyncStyles from re-applying a profile to this view/sheet

SHA-256 checksum of the ViewStylePack JSON used to detect template drift [Phase 137]

Cluster grouping key for SmartTagPlacement band alignment (auto-assigned)

Entourage scale factor out of range
Plumbing equipment pressure out of range
Pipe fitting head loss > design limit
IP rating below minimum for location

fabrication.description: MEP fabrication containment depth in mm
MEP fabrication containment width in mm

MEP fabrication ductwork width in mm

MEP fabrication pipework nominal diameter in mm

tier_4_10.description: Commissioning state (Draft / Pre-C / Witness / Final)
Commissioning date (ISO 8601) — when state was last stamped
Commissioning operative — name / ID of engineer who stamped the asset
Uganda local price (UGX) — quoted supplier price ex-works
International price (USD) — CIF/DAP quote for imported goods
Quote reference — supplier quote/PO number
Product stage carbon A1-A3 (kgCO2e) — cradle-to-gate embodied
Transport stage carbon A4 (kgCO2e) — factory-to-site haulage
Operational energy carbon B6 (kgCO2e/yr) — annual in-use emissions
Fabrication spool number — BS EN ISO 6412 isometric reference
Fabrication status (Designed / Spool released / Fabricated / Delivered / Installed)
QC inspector — name / ID of signing engineer
Clash triage severity (0-5) — higher = more blocking
Clash triage category (Hard / Soft / Tolerance / Workflow)
Clash resolution status (Open / Under Review / Resolved / Accepted)
As-built deviation (mm) — delta vs design position from reality capture
As-built capture date (ISO 8601) — when reality-capture snapshot was taken
Model health score (0-100) — last computed compliance / data quality rating
IFC PSet override — custom IFC property set / value mapping for export
ACC Issue ID — Autodesk Construction Cloud Issue round-trip reference
ACC sync status (Pending / Synced / Conflict / Failed)
Commissioning witness — name / ID of client/third-party observer
Commissioning free-text notes (defects, overrides, escalations)
Installation labour hours (N-G12) — estimated man-hours for install
Labour crew identifier — crew code assigned to install
Labour rate (GBP/hr) — override for cost roll-up
Construction stage carbon A5 (kgCO2e) — site installation emissions
End-of-life carbon C1 (kgCO2e) — demolition energy
End-of-life carbon C2 (kgCO2e) — transport to waste processing
End-of-life carbon C3-C4 (kgCO2e) — waste processing + disposal
Clash triage composite score (0-100) — weighted severity x business impact
Clash resolution action — remediation action taken or planned
Model health score capture date (ISO 8601)
Assembly total weight in kilograms (sum of member volume x material density)
Hydrostatic or pneumatic test pressure for the assembly in bar
Fabrication location (SHOP / FIELD / VENDOR)
Fabrication sequence number within the fabrication package
ISO 8601 date when assembly was shipped to site

Planned or actual installation date [ISO 19650-3:2020]. Canonical GUID cfc716aa supersedes the v4-fabrication alias 953575a9 (which is still bound to ASS_INSTALL_DATE_TXT in MR_PARAMETERS.txt and marked DEPRECATED).
Bill of materials revision code (e.g. P01, C01)
Total number of welds in the assembly
Total number of bolted connections in the assembly
Total number of flanged connections in the assembly
Total number of inline fittings in the assembly
Total linear length of the assembly in millimetres
Number of cut operations required to fabricate the assembly
External insulation surface area in square metres
Number of supports / hangers referenced by the assembly
Free-text fabrication notes consumed by ShopDrawingComposer
Reference to the generated shop / spool drawing sheet number
USD to UGX exchange rate snapshot used on quote date
Estimated labour hours per element for install takeoff
Labour rate in UGX per hour
Shipping cost component in UGX
Import duty percentage applied to USD price
LPS class per BS EN 62305 (I / II / III / IV)
Rolling sphere radius in metres per BS EN 62305 class (20 / 30 / 45 / 60)
Air terminal mesh grid size in metres per BS EN 62305 class
Count of air terminals / lightning rods on the protected zone
Count of down conductors per BS EN 62305 (min 2 for class IV, 4 for class I)
Count of earth electrodes serving the LPS
Measured earth resistance in ohms (target <10 ohm per BS EN 62305)
Equipotential bonding type (DIRECT / SPD / ISOLATING_SPARK_GAP)
Protection cone half-angle in degrees per BS EN 62305 class
Lightning protection zone per BS EN 62305-4 (LPZ0A / LPZ0B / LPZ1 / LPZ2 / LPZ3)
Risk assessment reference document per BS EN 62305-2
Surge protection device level (Type 1 / Type 2 / Type 3)
Separation distance (s) between LPS and services in millimetres
Down conductor cross section in mm2 (min 50 mm2 copper per BS EN 62305)
Earth electrode type (ROD / RING / FOUNDATION / MESH)
Inspection interval in months (12 for class I/II, 24 for class III/IV)
ISO 8601 date of last LPS test / inspection
Certificate reference for the LPS inspection / commissioning
Plugin-written LPS compliance verdict (PASS / WARN / FAIL — N items / SPACING FAIL / SEP DIST FAIL / EARTH FAIL)
Down conductor material (COPPER / ALUMINIUM / STEEL) used for separation distance km factor

Project-specific ground flash density Ng (flashes/km2/year). Set from a lightning location service to override the regional default in STING_LPS_FLASH_DENSITY.json. RunRiskAssessment honours this value if > 0.

ifc_property_mapping.description: ENH-006: Maps STING parameters to IFC property sets and names for IFC export

Compliance check: fls travel dist m

Wall Sound Transmission Class minimum rating
Embodied carbon footprint limit per unit
VOC emissions limit for indoor air quality
Lift car minimum size for wheelchair access

sheet_tokens.description: Sheet discipline from viewport element majority
